commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Feishu drive pagination inputs, cursor-aware `list` and `info` handling, and mocked regression tests for multi-page drive listing.

PR surface: Source +55, Tests +150. Total +205 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main passes only `folder_token` to `drive.file.list` for the affected paths and `getFileInfo` searches only the first page. I did not run a live Feishu tenant test in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blocker is contributor or maintainer real Feishu/Lark behavior proof; ClawSweeper cannot supply that external setup proof on behalf of this PR.

target.title: fix(feishu): add pagination support for drive list and info
target.body:
## Summary

Feishu drive list/info missing pagination support

## Changes

- `extensions/feishu/src/drive-schema.ts`: Add page_size, page_token, and all parameters
- `extensions/feishu/src/drive.ts`: Add pagination loop for listFolder and getFileInfo

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Feishu drive list and info actions lacked pagination, failing when folders contain more than 10 items (the default page size).

Real environment tested: ubuntu-24.04, Node 24, branch fix/issue-93928-feishu-drive-pagination.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:
  node scripts/test-projects.mjs extensions/feishu/src/drive.test.ts

Evidence after fix:

```
$ node scripts/test-projects.mjs extensions/feishu/src/drive.test.ts
 RUN  v4.1.8

 ✓ extensions/feishu/src/drive.test.ts (17 tests)

 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  17 passed (17)
   Duration  12.81s
```

Observed result after fix: All 17 drive tests pass, including pagination-related scenarios. The has_more + page_token loop matches the existing pattern used elsewhere in the codebase.

What was not tested: End-to-end with real Feishu tenant credentials (requires platform-specific setup not available in this environment).

Closes: #93928

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
